HTML template for a login page with username and password fields.

# Purpose
This template file is used in a web application to define the structure of a login page. It extends a base template, `base.html`, and specifies content for the `header` and `content` blocks. The `header` block includes a title, "Log In", while the `content` block contains an HTML form with fields for `username` and `password`, both of which are required. The form uses the POST method to submit the login credentials.
